title: Dekton 9PC Extra Long Torx Hex Key Set | Heat Treated for Strength | Ideal for Precision Fastening | Handy Key Holder Included | Star Allen Key Set for Home Repairs & DIY | Includes Sizes T10 to T50
features: Includes sizes: T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T40, T45, T50.
description: The Dekton Torx Hex Key Set is expertly designed for precision fastening and durability. Heat-treated for extra strength, these tools are perfect for tackling various home repairs and DIY projects. The set includes sizes ranging from T10 to T50, catering to a wide array of fastening needs. Each key is crafted to fit securely in fasteners, reducing the risk of slipping or stripping. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip, even during extended use, and the included handy key holder keeps everything organized and easily accessible. Ideal for both professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts, this set provides reliable performance and convenience for any task.
